Update to 0.9.6b1 - recommended over 0.9.5 stable by author
	change dependency to php4 as it requires php4 for sessions and a few other things
	Master site changed, replace with new site
	Update files/Makefile.acid to include new html and php files
	Update checksum in distinfo
	Update pkg-plist for new files included
